hero.headline:
Your Escape to Total Relaxation
Starts Here
hero.subheadline: Life moves fast. You deserve a place where time slows down. Pure Harmony Day Spa offers luxurious massage, skincare, and medical aesthetics in a serene Des Peres retreat — so you can leave feeling completely renewed.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Luxury Treatments Tailored<br class="hidden md:block"> to Your Needs
services.subtitle: From soothing massages to advanced medical aesthetics, our experienced therapists and estheticians deliver personalized care in a clean, welcoming environment.

cards.title: Massage Therapy
cards.description: Deep Tissue, Couple's Massage, Prenatal, Hot Stone, Lymphatic Drainage, Cupping, Reiki, and more. Total relief for body and mind.

cards.title: Facials & Skin Care
cards.description: Express, Spa, Glass Skin, Dermaplaning, and Microneedling facials using PCA Skincare products. Reveal your healthiest, most radiant skin.

cards.title: Medical Aesthetics
cards.description: Botox, Juvederm, Latisse, chemical peels, and microdermabrasion administered by qualified professionals for lasting rejuvenation.

cards.title: Lashes & Brows
cards.description: Mink eyelash extensions, lash lifts, brow shaping, and tinting for a polished, effortlessly beautiful look every day.

cards.title: Nail Care & Pedicures
cards.description: Spa manicures and pedicures that deliver relaxation and beautiful results. Treat your hands and feet to the care they deserve.

cards.title: Body & Scalp Treatments
cards.description: Sole Revival foot scrubs with warm stones, specialized scalp treatments, and full-body waxing for total head-to-toe wellness.

steps.title: Book Your Appointment
steps.description: Call us or book online. Tell us what you need — whether it's stress relief, skin concerns, or a full luxury escape. We'll match you with the perfect treatment.

steps.title: Relax & Be Pampered
steps.description: Arrive at our tranquil Des Peres spa and let our experienced therapists take care of everything. Every treatment is personalized to your unique needs and preferences.

steps.title: Leave Feeling Renewed
steps.description: Walk out feeling balanced, rejuvenated, and completely refreshed. Our guests leave not just looking better, but feeling like the best version of themselves.

about.label: Why Guests Choose Us
about.headline: More Than a Spa — Your Personal Wellness Sanctuary
about.description: Since 2007, Pure Harmony Day Spa has been the premier destination for relaxation and rejuvenation in Des Peres. With 19 years of dedicated service, our experienced therapists and estheticians have built a loyal following of guests who trust us with their self-care. We combine traditional spa luxury with advanced medical aesthetics in one welcoming location.

features.title: Experienced, Licensed Professionals
features.description: Every therapist and esthetician is fully licensed, extensively trained, and passionate about delivering personalized care.

features.title: 30+ Treatments Under One Roof
features.description: From massage and facials to Botox and chemical peels — everything you need for total wellness in a single visit.

features.title: Your Satisfaction, Guaranteed
features.description: We want every visit to exceed your expectations. If something isn't right, we will make it right — that is our promise to you.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every treatment is clearly priced. Choose individual services or save with our curated spa packages.

guarantee.headline: Our "Total Harmony" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any treatment, let us know before you leave and we will make it right on the spot. We have built our reputation over 19 years on trust, quality, and genuine care for every guest who walks through our doors.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can call us at 314-822-9907 or book through our website. We typically have same-week availability, and our front desk team will help match you with the perfect treatment and therapist.

faqs.question: What should I expect during my first visit?
faqs.answer: Arrive 10-15 minutes early to fill out a brief intake form. Your therapist will discuss your goals and customize your treatment. We provide robes, towels, and everything you need — just bring yourself and relax.

faqs.question: Do you offer couples treatments?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our Couple's Massage is one of our most popular services. It's perfect for date nights, anniversaries, or simply unwinding together in our serene dual treatment room.

faqs.question: Are your medical aesthetic treatments safe?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All medical aesthetic services including Botox and Juvederm are administered by qualified, licensed professionals. We use only FDA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols.

faqs.question: Do you offer gift cards or spa packages?
faqs.answer: Yes! Gift cards are available in any amount and make wonderful gifts. We also offer curated spa packages that combine multiple treatments at a special price for the ultimate luxury experience.

testimonials.name: Loyal Client
testimonials.text: Pure Harmony Day Spa is the best spa in St. Louis. The facials are out of this world, the massages are great, and the pedicures are really good. Tammy gives the best facials and the rest of the staff is top notch.

testimonials.name: 5-Year Regular
testimonials.text: I have been going to this spa for the past 5 years. The front desk ladies are wonderful. I always refer my friends and family here for deep tissue massages, facials, and lash extensions.

testimonials.name: First-Time Visitor
testimonials.text: I scheduled an appointment to have the mink eyelash extensions and I had a wonderful experience! The spa is very clean and welcoming, and the staff was professional and friendly.

contact.headline:
Ready to Discover
the New You?
contact.subtitle: Book your appointment today. Whether it's a relaxing massage, rejuvenating facial, or advanced aesthetic treatment — your path to wellness starts with a single call.
